nodes.label: Unit tests for Weaviate/MongoDB sync event handlers.  Tests cover: - DataRoomDea
Test that non-DataRoomDealMovedEvent events are ignored.
Test handling when deal_id is missing.
Test handling when Weaviate sync fails.
Test handling when MongoDB sync fails.
Test handling when Weaviate credentials are missing.
Test handling when MongoDB credentials are missing.
Test handling when organisation_id is missing.
Test handling with empty parent_portfolio_ids list.
Test handling when deal_id is an empty string.
Test that non-VMDataRoomFileMovedEvent events are ignored.
Test handling when file_id is missing.
Test handling when both Weaviate and MongoDB sync fail.
Test handling when organisation_id is missing.
Test handling with empty parent_folder_ids list.
Test handling when Weaviate credentials are missing.
Test handling when MongoDB credentials are missing.
Test handling when file_id (aggregateId) is an empty string.
Test that non-VMDataRoomFileRenamedEvent events are ignored.
Test handling when newFileName is missing.
Test handling when organisation_id is missing.
Test handling with None values for optional fields (dealId, folderId).
Test handling when Weaviate credentials are missing.
Test handling when MongoDB credentials are missing.
Test handling when newFileName is an empty string.
Test handling when file_id (aggregateId) is an empty string.
Test that non-VMDataRoomFolderMovedEvent events are ignored.
Test handling when folder_id is missing.
Test handling when both sync operations fail.
Test handling when organisation_id is missing.
Test handling with empty parent_folder_ids list and no parent_id.
Test handling when Weaviate credentials are missing.
Test handling when MongoDB credentials are missing.
Test handling when folder_id (aggregateId) is an empty string.
Test retry processing with permanently failed Weaviate records.
Test retry processing with permanently failed MongoDB records.
Test handling when Weaviate processor throws exception.
Test handling when MongoDB processor throws exception.
Integration-like tests to verify all handlers work correctly.
Test that all handlers can be initialized without errors.
Test that all handlers correctly ignore events they don't handle.
